title: Baby product safety - Canada.ca
content:
Find out how to safely use baby slings, strollers, carriages, baby bottles, pacifiers, cribs, cradles and bassinets.

## Services and information

### Setting up a safe nursery
Baby room ideas, decorating, crib placement, securing furniture, toy safety; baby items your nursery doesn't need.

### Cribs, cradles and bassinets
Learn about buying a crib, cradle or bassinet that is safe for your child.

### Creating a safe sleep environment
The ABCs of safe sleep; safety tips for your baby’s sleep environment.

### Safe sleep on the go
Safe sleep tips on the go; what to do if your baby falls asleep in a stroller, baby carrier or car seat.
Safe assembly, use, placement and maintenance of playpens.

### Strollers and carriages
Safety tips for choosing, using and buying baby strollers and baby carriages.

### Baby slings and carriers
Position, protect and carry your baby safely; buying tips.

### Dressing your baby for sleep
Safety tips for baby clothing designed for sleep, sleep sacks and preventing overheating.

### Children's sleepwear
Safe fabrics and styles for your kid’s sleepwear.

### Baby bottles, pacifiers and teething necklaces
Safely bottle feed your baby; tips for cleaning, inspecting and replacing bottles and pacifiers.
Learn how to keep your child safe in the bathtub and properly use bath seats.
Learn how to keep your infant safe when using change tables and playpen attachments.
Learn how to choose and safely use a high chair for your child.
Learn how to choose a safety gate for your child, and how to properly install and use it.

### Suspended baby jumpers
Learn how to keep your child safe with correct installation and use of a suspended baby jumper.
